objective: Run fresh Maven, Docker, backend, frontend, API, SIT, UAT, and release-style validation against the current Legent workspace; log discovered issues in .codex memory before fixing.
rollbackNotes: This checkpoint is a test-run record only. Revert only this checkpoint and subsequent QA/fix memory entries if the whole run must be abandoned; do not revert unrelated pre-existing dirty files.

validationResults.summary: All 16 Maven reactor modules completed successfully after focused fixes.
Frontend dependency install, static checks, build, unit coverage, visual, sanitize, full Chromium, and smoke suites passed; credentialed target login smoke remains skipped without target credentials.

validationResults.command: scripts/ops validation gates and production overlay render
validationResults.summary: Codex validation, environment placeholder validation, route map, repo artifact hygiene, release evidence validator self-tests, production overlay validation, Compose config, and Kustomize render passed locally.

validationResults.command: docker compose --env-file .env.example build --no-cache; targeted no-cache rebuilds for foundation-service and delivery-service after final fixes; docker compose down -v --remove-orphans; docker compose up -d; scripts\ops\validate-compose-health.ps1

validationResults.command: API/SIT checks and docker compose log scan
validationResults.summary: Frontend health, direct service actuators, gateway health, expected 401/403/404 API responses, and final actionable error/exception log scan passed.
Stopped containers, dangling images, and unused build cache were pruned after validation.

residualRisks: Credentialed target login smoke remains skipped until E2E_ADMIN_EMAIL and E2E_ADMIN_PASSWORD are supplied.
Frontend coverage remains very low despite passing conservative thresholds.
Production readiness remains blocked pending target egress, image provenance, live smoke/load/restore, monitoring, TLS/admission, CI/security transcript, and provider-approved high-volume evidence.
nextAction: Keep production readiness blocked pending target evidence; expand credentialed UAT and frontend coverage in follow-up work.
